name: kill_worker Directive Fast-Path
goal: Add an optional directive_id parameter to kill_worker so it skips the Opus grader when the directive is already marked completed.

tasks.name: Add directive fast-path to kill_worker
tasks.description: Add directive_id param to kill_worker (class method + MCP wrapper) in orchestrator_mcp.py; skip grader when directives.status == 'completed' for that id; two new tests in test_orchestrator_mcp.py cover both branches.

steps.description: Add test_kill_worker_fast_path_skips_grader_when_directive_completed (must pass non-empty original_objective/evidence so a broken fast-path would fall through to the elif and call the grader, making the test capable of failing) and test_kill_worker_directive_not_completed_still_calls_grader to class TestInlineGraderEnforcement in commander/tests/test_orchestrator_mcp.py, after test_kill_without_evidence_skips_grader (line 2393)
Run the two new tests, verify they fail with TypeError (directive_id not yet a valid kwarg)
steps.command: cd commander && python -m pytest tests/test_orchestrator_mcp.py -k "test_kill_worker_fast_path_skips_grader_when_directive_completed or test_kill_worker_directive_not_completed_still_calls_grader" -v
steps.expected: FAILED — TypeError: kill_worker() got an unexpected keyword argument 'directive_id'

steps.description: Add directive_id: int | None = None param to kill_worker class method (orchestrator_mcp.py:3492); add directive_completed lookup (try/except SELECT status FROM directives WHERE id = ?) before the existing grader block; change `if original_objective and evidence:` to `elif` with the new `if directive_completed:` branch first
Add matching directive_id param to the kill_worker MCP tool wrapper (orchestrator_mcp.py:4218-4224), pass through to tools.kill_worker(...), update docstring
Run the two new tests again, verify they pass
steps.command: cd commander && python -m pytest tests/test_orchestrator_mcp.py -k "test_kill_worker_fast_path_skips_grader_when_directive_completed or test_kill_worker_directive_not_completed_still_calls_grader" -v

steps.description: Run the full commander test suite to confirm no regressions
